description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a wood-textured surface and black metal legs, designed for durability and stability. The desk features a set of two floating shelves positioned above the main work surface, providing additional storage or display space. On the left side beneath the desktop, there is a set of drawers integrated into the frame, offering convenient storage for office supplies or personal items. The desktop has a cable management grommet on the rear right corner, allowing for organized routing of electronic device cables. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a neutral color palette suitable for contemporary urban environments. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for regular use in professional or home office settings.
description: A modern wood-textured desk with black metal legs, integrated drawers, and two floating shelves above the main surface. Features a cable management grommet and a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the desktop, the two floating shelves above, and the left-side drawers beneath the desk.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the desk, the drawers on the left, and the two floating shelves above the main surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the depth of the desk, the floating shelves, and the cable management grommet on the right rear corner.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the wood grain pattern, the position of the drawers, and the arrangement of the floating shelves.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the drawers on the left and the cable grommet on the right rear corner; the floating shelves are positioned above the main work surface.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or writing desk for office or home office use
